'''Dantooine's Second Star''' was a [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] nestled within the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system's]] [[Ferionic Nebula]]. Somewhat round in appearance, the [[Iron/Legends|iron]] asteroid was actually designated a [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]], and was under the control of a little known, small band of thugs called the [[Velocity Mercenaries]]. The [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] mostly kept to themselves, until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] moved into the area. Following the Empire's incursion, the Velocity Mercenaries began launching continuous attacks against them, hoping to drive the Empire out of [[Area Ferionic 7-IK]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
